data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-03-22)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $2.76T, down by -2.06% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $83,175 and $84,584 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $84,345, up by 0.26%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading mixed. Market outperformers include AUCTION, ACX, and WING, up by 33%, 28%, and 23%, respectively.

Market movers:

ETH: $1997.61 (+1.06%)

XRP: $2.408 (-0.24%)

BNB: $632.23 (+0.16%)

SOL: $130.45 (+1.36%)

ADA: $0.715 (+0.21%)

DOGE: $0.16935 (+0.65%)

TRX: $0.2358 (+0.81%)

WBTC: $84260.92 (+0.31%)

TRUMP: $11.12 (+1.83%)

TON: $3.594 (-0.94%)

Top gainers on Binance:

AUCTION/USDT (+33%)

ACX/USDT (+28%)

WING/USDT (+23%)

data.title: Ethereum Surpasses $2000 Amid Daily Gains
data.description: According to PANews, Ethereum (ETH) has recently exceeded the $2000 mark, currently trading at $2000.80 per coin. The cryptocurrency has experienced a daily increase of 2.57%.

data.title: ETH breaks through 2000 USDT, up 1.11% in 24 hours
data.description: OKX market shows that ETH has broken through 2000 USDT and is now at 2000.07 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 1.11%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Bitcoin Network Transaction Fees Experience Slight Increase
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from mempool.space indicates a slight rise in Bitcoin network transaction fees. The fees for high-priority transactions are currently reported at 12 Sat/byte, marking an increase from the previous block. Bitcoin block 888888 is currently being mined, while the median miner fee for the preceding block, 888887, was 3 Sat/byte.

data.title: Bitcoin's 888,888th Block Successfully Mined
data.description: According to PANews, Simon Gerovich, CEO of the Japanese publicly listed company Metaplanet, announced on the X platform that Bitcoin's 888,888th block has just been mined. This milestone marks a significant event in the cryptocurrency's ongoing development.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,000 USDT with a 1.19% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 22, 2025, 09:24 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,001.530029 USDT, with a narrowed 1.19% increase in 24 hours.

data.title:
$BTC Weekend time.

Since volatility and overall headlines were much lower last week and into the weekend, I think there's a good chance for us to just chop sideways again.

We've had some volatile weekends previously where gaps were created as price moved during the weekend.

1confirmation founder: Ethereum has become the dominant ecosystem for RWA
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News 1confirmation founder Nick Tomaino posted on the X platform that the tokenization of real assets (RWA) is accelerating, covering treasury bonds, stocks, bonds, private credit, commodities, real estate and other fields. Among them, Ethereum has become the dominant ecosystem for the tokenization of real assets.

data.title: Pi Network Review: Mining Crypto with a Mobile Phone
data.description:
Pi Network has caught the attention of the entire crypto industry, offering an accessible and novel mechanism for mining cryptocurrencies using only a mobile phone. Since its launch, the project has been considered both disruptive and controversial, breaking the paradigms of a sector historically dominated by specialized equipment and high energy consumption.
